mapper.sql: mt.TEST_SNO AS testSno, mt.USER_ID AS userId, mt.ORG_ID AS orgId, mt.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, mt.HEADER_YN AS headerYn, mt.XML_YN AS xmlYn, mt.TEST_NAME AS testName, mt.TEST_DESC AS testDesc, mt.TEST_DATA AS testData, mt.TEST_DATA1 AS testData1, mt.TEST_DATA2 AS testData2, mt.TEST_DATA3 AS testData3, mt.TEST_DATA4 AS testData4, mt.TEST_GROUP_ID AS testGroupId, mt.TRX_ID AS trxId, mt.DEFAULT_PROXY_YN AS defaultProxyYn, mt.TEST_HEADER_DATA AS testHeaderData, mt.TEST_HEADER_USE_YN AS testHeaderUseYn, mt.PROXY_FIELD AS proxyField, mt.PROXY_VALUE AS proxyValue, mt.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, mt.LAST_UPDATE_USERID AS lastUpdateUserId, mt.TEST_HEADER_DATA1 AS testHeaderData1
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(TEST_SNO), 0) + 1 FROM FWK_MESSAGE_TEST
INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_TEST ( TEST_SNO, USER_ID, ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, HEADER_YN, XML_YN, TEST_NAME, TEST_DESC, TEST_DATA, TEST_DATA1, TEST_DATA2, TEST_DATA3, TEST_DATA4, TEST_GROUP_ID, TRX_ID, DEFAULT_PROXY_YN, TEST_HEADER_DATA, TEST_HEADER_USE_YN, PROXY_FIELD, PROXY_VALUE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USERID, TEST_HEADER_DATA1 ) VALUES ( #{dto.testSno}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.orgId}, #{dto.messageId}, NVL(#{dto.headerYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), NVL(#{dto.xmlYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{dto.testName}, #{dto.testDesc}, #{dto.testData}, #{dto.testData1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.testData2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.testData3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.testData4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{dto.testGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DEFAULT'), #{dto.trxId}, NVL(#{dto.defaultProxyYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{dto.testHeaderData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.testHeaderUseYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.proxyField, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.proxyValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.testHeaderData1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_MESSAGE_TEST SET USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, ORG_ID = #{dto.orgId}, MESSAGE_ID = #{dto.messageId}, HEADER_YN = #{dto.headerYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, XML_YN = #{dto.xmlYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_NAME = #{dto.testName}, TEST_DESC = #{dto.testDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_DATA = #{dto.testData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_DATA1 = #{dto.testData1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_DATA2 = #{dto.testData2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_DATA3 = #{dto.testData3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_DATA4 = #{dto.testData4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_GROUP_ID = #{dto.testGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRX_ID = #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEFAULT_PROXY_YN = #{dto.defaultProxyYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_HEADER_DATA = #{dto.testHeaderData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEST_HEADER_USE_YN = #{dto.testHeaderUseYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROXY_FIELD = #{dto.proxyField, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROXY_VALUE = #{dto.proxyValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USERID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, TEST_HEADER_DATA1 = #{dto.testHeaderData1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE TEST_SNO = #{dto.testSno}
mapper.select:
SELECT
AND mt.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}
AND mt.HEADER_YN = #{headerYn}
AND mt.TEST_NAME LIKE '%' || #{testName} || '%'
AND DBMS_LOB.INSTR(mt.TEST_DATA, #{testData}) > 0
AND mt.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%'
ORDER BY mt.TEST_SNO DESC
